themes.label: Creation
themes.summary: This chapter underscores creation, the heavens and earth, or God’s creative ordering work. Local Strong’s word study and cross references data reinforce this reading across 9 verses. Commentary leans on "What does the light in Goshen symbolize about God's people?". Cross references echo "Light".
